states.name: MoveToBallAndGetPossession()
states.description: I'm the center mid with the ball. I need to find an open teammate to pass to.

states.name: Pass(RightStriker)
states.description: My right striker is open and the most forward. I'll pass to them.

states.name: Pass(LeftStriker)
states.description: My left striker is open and the most forward. I'll pass to them.

states.name: Pass(RightWinger)
states.description: The right winger is open, so I'll make the pass to them.

states.name: Pass(LeftWinger)
states.description: The left winger is open, so I'll pass to them.

states.name: MoveTo(λ_target_0())
states.description: Now that I have passed the ball, I will move to a supporting position.
